execution_history.summary: Review completed with no findings. The B0004 implementation matches the guardrail spec: template-based prompt injection is in place, guardrail metadata and execution history are persisted, blocked role-scope results retain `next_agent` and `block_reason`, docs were updated, and targeted tests cover the new behavior.
